auth.label: API Key
auth.description: DeepL API key sent with the DeepL-Auth-Key authorization scheme. Find and manage it in the API Keys & Limits tab of your DeepL API account: https://developers.deepl.com/docs/getting-started/managing-api-keys.

actions.name: get_usage
actions.description: Fetch the current DeepL API usage and quota counters for the connected API key.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require additional input parameters.

character_count.description: The total billed character count for the current billing period.

character_limit.description: The billed character limit for the current billing period.

api_key_character_count.description: The billed character count attributed to the current API key.

api_key_character_limit.description: The billed character limit attributed to the current API key.

document_count.description: The total billed document count for the current billing period.

document_limit.description: The billed document limit for the current billing period.

api_key_document_count.description: The billed document count attributed to the current API key.

api_key_document_limit.description: The billed document limit attributed to the current API key.

team_document_count.description: The billed team document count for the current billing period.

team_document_limit.description: The billed team document limit for the current billing period.

start_time.description: The start timestamp of the current billing period.

end_time.description: The end timestamp of the current billing period.

api_key_character_count.description: The character count attributed to the current API key for this product.

api_key_document_count.description: The document count attributed to the current API key for this product.

character_count.description: The total billed character count for this product.

document_count.description: The total billed document count for this product.

usage.description: The DeepL usage payload returned by the API.

actions.name: list_supported_languages
actions.description: List the DeepL source or target languages currently supported by the translation API.

type.description: Whether to list source or target languages.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing DeepL supported languages.

type.description: The DeepL language family returned by the API.

supports_formality.description: Whether this target language supports the formality parameter.

languages.description: The supported DeepL languages returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized DeepL supported language list.

actions.name: translate_text
actions.description: Translate one or more text items with DeepL and return the normalized translation results.

items.description: One text item to translate with DeepL.

texts.description: The text items to translate in a single DeepL request.

target_lang.description: The target language code for the translation.

source_lang.description: The source language code to force upstream.

context.description: Optional context that guides translation without being translated itself.

formality.description: The DeepL formality preference for supported target languages.

preserve_formatting.description: Whether DeepL should preserve the original input formatting.

show_billed_characters.description: Whether DeepL should include billed_characters in the translation response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for translating text with DeepL.

detected_source_language.description: The source language detected by DeepL.

text.description: The translated text returned by DeepL.

billed_characters.description: The billed character count for this translation, when requested.

model_type_used.description: The DeepL translation model used for this result.

items.description: One translated text entry returned by DeepL.

translations.description: The translated text results returned by DeepL.

outputSchema.description: The normalized DeepL text translation result.
